meta.tldr: This release introduces support for Amazon Bedrock powered by Mantle, enabled via the `CLAUDE_CODE_USE_MANTLE=1` environment variable, expanding the range of available models. The default effort level has been increased from medium to high for API-key, Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry, Team, and Enterprise users, though this can be controlled with the `/effort` command. A compact `Slacked #channel` header with a clickable channel link is now available for Slack MCP send-message tool calls, improving usability. Plugin output styles now support the `keep-coding-instructions` frontmatter field, and `UserPromptSubmit` hooks can now set the session title using `hookSpecificOutput.sessionTitle`. Plugin skills declared via `"skills": ["./"]` now use the skill's frontmatter `name` for invocation, providing a stable name across install methods. Several fixes address error surfacing, including immediate error display for 429 rate-limit responses and macOS Console login failures. Plugin skill hooks defined in YAML frontmatter are no longer silently ignored, and plugin hooks now function correctly when `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` is not set. Additionally, `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` now resolves to the installed cache for local-marketplace plugins on startup. Scrollback issues, multiline prompt indentation, Shift+Space behavior in search, hyperlink handling in tmux, alt-screen rendering, `FORCE_HYPERLINK` environment variable usage, native terminal cursor tracking, Bedrock invocation of Sonnet 3.5 v2, SDK/print mode conversation history preservation, `--resume` behavior, and CJK text corruption have all been resolved. VSCode users will see reduced cold-open subprocess work and a warning banner for `settings.json` parse failures. This is a recommended upgrade to benefit from the new features and bug fixes.

features.name: Agent Teams
features.description: Full multi-agent orchestration. A team lead spawns named teammates, each running as a separate Claude Code instance with a shared task list and direct inter-agent messaging.
key_details: 3–5 teammates recommended
Teammates inherit the lead's model unless overridden
Shift+Down cycles between teammates in in-process mode
Ctrl+T opens shared task list
Tasks: pending → in progress → completed with dependency support
File locking prevents race conditions on task claiming
Teammates do NOT inherit lead's conversation history — include context in spawn prompt
TeammateIdle and TaskCompleted hooks support exit code 2 to keep working
Lead must clean up team — shut down teammates before cleanup
Plan approval mode: teammate works read-only then submits plan for lead review

features.name: Subagents
features.description: Focused workers that run inside a session and report back to the caller. Simpler than agent teams — no inter-agent messaging, no shared task list.
key_details: Cannot spawn other subagents (no nesting)
Do not inherit parent conversation history
Define in .claude/agents/*.md (project) or ~/.claude/agents/*.md (user)
Invoke with --agent <name> flag or Agent tool
Frontmatter fields: name, description, tools, disallowedTools, model, permissionMode, mcpServers, hooks, maxTurns, skills, memory
Built-in: Explore (Haiku, read-only), Plan (read-only), General-purpose, Bash, Claude Code Guide

features.name: HTTP Hooks
features.description: Lifecycle hooks that fire HTTP requests to a local server at key events. Use for command validation, audit logging, CI triggers, and custom security policies.
key_details: Exit code 2 from hook sends feedback and blocks action
SessionEnd hooks timeout configurable via CLAUDE_CODE_SESSIONEND_HOOKS_TIMEOUT_MS
Hooks fire per-session — JSON-output hooks no longer inject no-op system-reminder messages
agent_id and agent_type fields available in hook events for subagent identification
worktree field added with name, path, branch, original repo directory

features.name: Plugin Marketplace
features.description: Full plugin ecosystem. Plugins distribute skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers. Managed via /plugin command or claude plugins CLI.
key_details: Plugin structure: .claude-plugin/plugin.json, skills/, agents/, hooks/
Skills namespaced: /plugin-name:skill-name
Project-scope and user-scope installs supported
/plugin validate for marketplace submission
/plugin marketplace update to refresh
/reload-plugins to activate changes without restart
--plugin-dir ./path for local dev (overrides installed same-name plugins)
Plugin-provided MCP servers deduplicated against manually configured ones
Marketplace supports git URLs without .git suffix (Azure DevOps, AWS CodeCommit)
CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR for custom cache location
strictKnownMarketplaces supports pathPattern for subdirectory sources

features.name: Sandboxing
features.description: OS-level filesystem and network isolation for autonomous execution. Enable with /sandbox.
key_details: Enable: /sandbox command
Filesystem: OS-level enforcement (Seatbelt on macOS, bubblewrap on Linux)
Default: read/write to CWD and children only
Network: proxy server outside sandbox, only approved domains accessible
All subprocesses (kubectl, terraform, npm) inherit restrictions
sandbox.excludedCommands for exemptions
sandbox.enableWeakerNetworkIsolation (macOS) for Go tools with custom MITM proxy
allowManagedDomainsOnly: non-allowed domains blocked automatically with no bypass

features.name: Checkpointing
features.description: Automatic state tracking for undo/rewind. Every user prompt creates a checkpoint persisted for 30 days.
key_details: Esc+Esc or /rewind opens rewind menu
Actions: restore code+conversation, restore conversation only, restore code only, summarize-from-here
30-day retention (configurable)
Limitation: Bash-modified files NOT tracked — only Claude's edit tools

features.name: Scheduled Tasks / Cron
features.description: Session-scoped task scheduling. /loop for recurring prompts, one-shot reminders via natural language.
key_details: Max 50 tasks per session
3-day auto-expiry for recurring tasks
No catch-up for missed fires
±10% jitter (max 15min) for recurring, ±90s for one-shots
Session-scoped only — not durable across restarts
Disable mid-session: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON env var
Tools: CronCreate, CronList, CronDelete

features.name: Fast Mode
features.description: Opus 4.6 at 2.5x speed at higher cost. Toggles with /fast. Persists across sessions.
key_details: ↯ icon appears while active
Compatible with 1M context window
Switching mid-conversation pays full uncached input price
/fast again to toggle off (stays on Opus 4.6)
settings.json: "fastMode": true

features.name: Automated Code Review (Teams/Enterprise)
features.description: Automated PR review using multi-agent parallel analysis. Posts inline PR comments.
key_details: Multiple specialized agents examine diff + full codebase in parallel
Severity: 🔴 Normal, 🟡 Nit, 🟣 Pre-existing
Verification step filters false positives
Customizable via CLAUDE.md and REVIEW.md in repo
Runs on PR creation and/or every push (configurable)
Average completion ~20 minutes

features.name: Voice Mode
features.description: Push-to-talk voice input with STT transcription. 20 languages supported.
key_details: Default key: space (rebindable via voice:pushToTalk in keybindings.json)
20 languages: includes Russian, Polish, Turkish, Dutch, Ukrainian, Greek, Czech, Danish, Swedish, Norwegian
Improved transcription for repo names and dev terms (regex, OAuth, JSON)
macOS native binary includes audio-input entitlement for microphone permission prompt

features.name: Remote Control
features.description: Expose a session to claude.ai/code for mobile monitoring and steering.
key_details: Start: /remote-control [--name "title"]
Custom session title visible in claude.ai/code
Poll rate: 10min while connected (was 1–2s), 300x server load reduction
Reconnection immediately wakes fast polling on transport loss

features.name: Git Worktrees
features.description: Isolated git worktrees for parallel agent work. Each agent gets its own copy, creates its own PR.
key_details: --worktree <name> flag to run on a specific worktree
ExitWorktree tool to leave an EnterWorktree session cleanly
Each sub-agent gets own worktree for isolation
worktree field in hook events: name, path, branch, original repo dir
Background task notifications include worktreePath and worktreeBranch

features.name: Agent SDK
features.description: Headless/programmatic Claude Code via -p mode or TypeScript/Python SDKs.
key_details: CLI: claude -p "prompt" --allowedTools --output-format json
--output-format: json, stream-json
--json-schema for structured output with validation
--append-system-prompt for custom system prompts
--continue / --resume <session-id> for multi-turn
Bash permission rules use prefix matching: Bash(git diff *)
TypeScript and Python SDKs available
SDK: platform.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/

features.name: MCP elicitation support
features.description: MCP servers can now request structured input mid-task via an interactive dialog (form fields or browser URL)

features.name: Elicitation hooks
features.description: Added new `Elicitation` and `ElicitationResult` hooks to intercept and override responses before they're sent back

features.name: Session quality survey
features.description: Enterprise admins can configure the sample rate via the `feedbackSurveyRate` setting

features.name: Plugin-shipped agent frontmatter
features.description: Added `effort`, `maxTurns`, and `disallowedTools` frontmatter support for plugin-shipped agents

features.name: Terminal notifications tmux support
features.description: Terminal notifications (iTerm2/Kitty/Ghostty popups, progress bar) now reach the outer terminal when running inside tmux with `set -g allow-passthrough on`

features.name: AI-generated session titles
features.description: Session tabs now get AI-generated titles based on your first message

features.name: Statusline Rate Limits
features.description: Added `rate_limits` field to statusline scripts for displaying Claude.ai rate limit usage (5-hour and 7-day windows with `used_percentage` and `resets_at`)

features.name: Plugin Marketplace Settings Source
features.description: Added `source: 'settings'` plugin marketplace source — declare plugin entries inline in settings.json

features.name: CLI Tool Usage Detection in Plugin Tips
features.description: Added CLI tool usage detection to plugin tips, in addition to file pattern matching

features.name: Effort Frontmatter for Skills and Slash Commands
features.description: Added `effort` frontmatter support for skills and slash commands to override the model effort level when invoked

features.name: Channels Permission Relay
features.description: Channel servers that declare the permission capability can forward tool approval prompts to your phone.

features.name: Managed Settings Drop-in Directory
features.description: Added `managed-settings.d/` drop-in directory alongside `managed-settings.json`, letting separate teams deploy independent policy fragments that merge alphabetically.

features.name: Reactive Environment Management Hooks
features.description: Added `CwdChanged` and `FileChanged` hook events for reactive environment management (e.g., direnv).

features.name: Transcript Search
features.description: Added transcript search — press `/` in transcript mode (`Ctrl+O`) to search, `n`/`N` to step through matches.

features.name: Initial Prompt in Agent Frontmatter
features.description: Agents can now declare `initialPrompt` in frontmatter to auto-submit a first turn.

features.name: Pasted Image Chips
features.description: Pasted images now insert an `[Image #N]` chip at the cursor so you can reference them positionally in your prompt.

features.name: Sandbox Fail If Unavailable Setting
features.description: Added `sandbox.failIfUnavailable` setting to exit with an error when sandbox is enabled but cannot start, instead of running unsandboxed.

features.name: Disable Deep Link Registration Setting
features.description: Added `disableDeepLinkRegistration` setting to prevent `claude-cli://` protocol handler registration.

features.name: Readline Alias for External Editor
features.description: Added `Ctrl+X Ctrl+E` as an alias for opening the external editor (readline-native binding; `Ctrl+G` still works).

features.name: Image Chips in Prompts
features.description: Pasted images now insert an `[Image #N]` chip at the cursor so you can reference them positionally in your prompt.

features.name: Plugin Options Available Externally
features.description: Plugin options (`manifest.userConfig`) now available externally — plugins can prompt for configuration at enable time, with `sensitive: true` values stored in keychain (macOS) or protected credentials file (other platforms).

features.name: Claude Can Reference Pasted Image Paths
features.description: Claude can now reference the on-disk path of clipboard-pasted images for file operations.

features.name: PowerShell Tool
features.description: Added PowerShell tool for Windows as an opt-in preview.

features.name: TaskCreated Hook
features.description: Added `TaskCreated` hook that fires when a task is created via `TaskCreate`

features.name: WorktreeCreate HTTP Hook Support
features.description: Added `WorktreeCreate` hook support for `type: "http"` — return the created worktree path via `hookSpecificOutput.worktreePath` in the response JSON

features.name: Allowed Channel Plugins Managed Setting
features.description: Added `allowedChannelPlugins` managed setting for team/enterprise admins to define a channel plugin allowlist

features.name: API Request ID Header
features.description: Added `x-client-request-id` header to API requests for debugging timeouts

features.name: Idle Return Prompt
features.description: Added idle-return prompt that nudges users returning after 75+ minutes to `/clear`, reducing unnecessary token re-caching on stale sessions

features.name: PowerShell Tool
features.description: Added PowerShell tool for Windows as an opt-in preview.

features.name: "defer" permission decision in PreToolUse hooks
features.description: Headless sessions can now pause at a tool call using `PreToolUse` hooks and resume with `-p --resume` to have the hook re-evaluate the permission decision.

features.name: PermissionDenied hook
features.description: Added `PermissionDenied` hook that fires after auto mode classifier denials. Returning `{retry: true}` tells the model it can retry the command.

features.name: Interactive Lessons
features.description: Interactive lessons teaching Claude Code features with animated demos.

features.name: MCP Tool Result Persistence Override
features.description: Added MCP tool result persistence override via `_meta["anthropic/maxResultSizeChars"]` annotation (up to 500K), allowing larger results like DB schemas to pass through without truncation

features.name: Disable Skill Shell Execution Setting
features.description: Added `disableSkillShellExecution` setting to disable inline shell execution in skills, custom slash commands, and plugin commands

features.name: Multi-line Prompts in Deep Links
features.description: Added support for multi-line prompts in `claude-cli://open?q=` deep links (encoded newlines `%0A` no longer rejected)

features.name: Plugins Can Ship Executables
features.description: Plugins can now ship executables under `bin/` and invoke them as bare commands from the Bash tool

features.name: Disable Skill Shell Execution
features.description: Added `disableSkillShellExecution` setting to disable inline shell execution in skills, custom slash commands, and plugin commands

features.name: forceRemoteSettingsRefresh policy setting
features.description: Added `forceRemoteSettingsRefresh` policy setting: when set, the CLI blocks startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched, and exits if the fetch fails (fail-closed)

features.name: Interactive Bedrock setup wizard
features.description: Added interactive Bedrock setup wizard accessible from the login screen when selecting "3rd-party platform" — guides you through AWS authentication, region configuration, credential verification, and model pinning

features.name: Force Remote Settings Refresh Policy
features.description: Adds a `forceRemoteSettingsRefresh` policy setting. When enabled, the CLI blocks startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched, and exits if the fetch fails (fail-closed).

features.name: Amazon Bedrock Mantle Support
features.description: Adds support for Amazon Bedrock powered by Mantle.
key_details: Enabled by setting the environment variable `CLAUDE_CODE_USE_MANTLE=1`.

features.name: Compact Slack MCP Channel Header
features.description: Adds a compact `Slacked #channel` header with a clickable channel link for Slack MCP send-message tool calls.

features.name: Keep Coding Instructions Frontmatter
features.description: Adds `keep-coding-instructions` frontmatter field support for plugin output styles.

features.name: UserPromptSubmit Session Title Hook
features.description: Adds `hookSpecificOutput.sessionTitle` to `UserPromptSubmit` hooks for setting the session title.

features.name: Plugin Skill Name from Frontmatter
features.description: Plugin skills declared via `"skills": ["./"]` now use the skill's frontmatter `name` for the invocation name instead of the directory basename, giving a stable name across install methods.

commands.name: /loop
commands.description: Run a prompt on a recurring interval. Defaults to 10 minutes if no interval specified.

commands.name: /batch
commands.description: Fan out multiple tasks from a file. Each task runs in its own worktree. Interactive planning then parallel execution.

commands.name: /simplify
commands.description: Run parallel agents for code quality, performance tuning, and CLAUDE.md compliance. Run after changes.

commands.name: /plan
commands.description: Enter plan mode. Optional description starts planning immediately.

commands.name: /feature-dev
commands.description: Spawn coordinated subagent team: code-explorer (maps architecture), code-architect (designs approach), code-reviewer (reviews output).

commands.name: /effort
commands.description: Set reasoning effort level. auto resets to default. Works while Claude is responding.

commands.name: /fast
commands.description: Toggle Opus 4.6 fast mode (2.5x speed, higher cost). Persists across sessions.

commands.name: /sandbox
commands.description: Toggle OS-level filesystem and network isolation.

commands.name: /compact
commands.description: Summarize conversation to reduce context. Preserves images for cache reuse.

commands.name: /context
commands.description: Show context usage. Identifies context-heavy tools, memory bloat, capacity warnings with optimization tips.

commands.name: /rewind
commands.description: Open checkpoint rewind menu (also Esc+Esc). Restore code, conversation, or both.

commands.name: /remote-control
commands.description: Start remote control session for monitoring from claude.ai/code or mobile.

commands.name: /plugin
commands.description: Manage plugins. Also: claude plugins.

commands.name: /reload-plugins
commands.description: Reload plugins without restarting the session.

commands.name: /agents
commands.description: Interactively manage subagents. Create/edit agent definitions.

commands.name: /model
commands.description: Switch model mid-session. Works while Claude is processing.

commands.name: /permissions
commands.description: Manage tool permissions.

commands.name: /review
commands.description: Review a PR or diff.

commands.name: /pr-comments
commands.description: Address PR review comments.

commands.name: /security-review
commands.description: Security review of changes.

commands.name: /fork
commands.description: Fork conversation. Forks no longer share plan files.

commands.name: /copy
commands.description: Copy last Claude message to clipboard. Press w to write to file instead (useful over SSH).

commands.name: /init
commands.description: Create CLAUDE.md with project conventions.

commands.name: /memory
commands.description: Manage memory files.

commands.name: /cost
commands.description: Show token usage and cost for current session.

commands.name: /doctor
commands.description: Diagnose installation and environment issues.

commands.name: /debug
commands.description: Toggle debug logging on mid-session (logs no longer written by default).

commands.name: /config
commands.description: Edit config. Escape cancels, Enter saves, Space toggles. Replaces deprecated /output-style.

commands.name: /output-style
commands.description: DEPRECATED since 2.1.73. Use /config instead.

commands.name: /claude-api
commands.description: Skill for building apps with the Claude API and Anthropic SDK.

commands.name: /clear
commands.description: Clear foreground only — does not kill background agent/bash tasks.

commands.name: /vim
commands.description: Open vim-like editor for multi-line input.

commands.name: /rename
commands.description: Rename session. Works while Claude is processing.

commands.name: /color
commands.description: Set/reset terminal color theme. /color default, /color reset, /color none all restore default.

commands.name: /terminal-setup
commands.description: Configure terminal integration.

commands.name: /buddy
commands.description: Hatch a small creature that watches you code (April 1st)

commands.name: /powerup
commands.description: Interactive lessons teaching Claude Code features with animated demos

commands.name: /release-notes
commands.description: /release-notes is now an interactive version picker

current.description: Sets how Claude Code handles permission prompts. bypassPermissions = full autonomous mode.
Headless one-shot mode with full tool access.
Machine-readable output for -p / headless mode.
Set reasoning effort level at launch.
Override model. Accepts full model IDs (e.g. claude-opus-4-6) or aliases.
Run on a specific git worktree.
Spawn in a tmux session.
Run in cloud for mobile handoff monitoring.
Run with a named agent definition. Name shown in terminal title.
Session-only agent definition via JSON (no file needed).
Restrict available tools. Supports prefix matching for Bash.
Resume last session. Fixed: works after --compact.
Resume a specific session by ID.
Load local plugin for dev/testing. Overrides installed same-name plugins.
Append custom text to system prompt. Works in both interactive and -p mode.
Override agent team display mode for this session.
Enforce JSON schema for structured output in -p mode.
Set a display name for the session at startup
Set a display name for the session at startup
For Anthropic Console (API billing) authentication with `claude auth login`
(research preview) — allow MCP servers to push messages into your session

Skips hooks, LSP, plugin sync, and skill directory walks for scripted `-p` calls; requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or an `apiKeyHelper` via `--settings` (OAuth and keychain auth disabled); auto-memory fully disabled
CLI flag for MCP config.
Resume a headless session after a PreToolUse hook pauses at a tool call.
Overridable prefix for Remote Control session names (default: hostname)

deprecated.note: Still works as alias but will be removed in future. Migrate all scripts.

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS
env_vars.purpose: Enable experimental agent teams feature

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON
env_vars.purpose: Stop all scheduled cron jobs immediately mid-session

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TERMINAL_TITLE
env_vars.purpose: Prevent Claude Code from modifying terminal title

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR
env_vars.purpose: Set custom directory for plugin cache

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_SESSIONEND_HOOKS_TIMEOUT_MS
env_vars.purpose: Configure SessionEnd hook timeout in milliseconds (was fixed at 1500ms)

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_GIT_INSTRUCTIONS
env_vars.purpose: Remove built-in commit and PR workflow instructions from system prompt

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS
env_vars.purpose: Override maximum output tokens (applies during conversation compaction too)

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: Required for API auth. Not needed when using claude.ai OAuth.

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_MODEL_OPTION
env_vars.purpose: Add a custom entry to the `/model` picker, with optional `_NAME` and `_DESCRIPTION` suffixed vars for display

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_SCRUB
env_vars.purpose: Strip Anthropic and cloud provider credentials from subprocess environments (Bash tool, hooks, MCP stdio servers).

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONSTREAMING_FALLBACK
env_vars.purpose: Disable the non-streaming fallback when streaming fails

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_{OPUS,SONNET,HAIKU}_MODEL_SUPPORTS
env_vars.purpose: Override effort/thinking capability detection for pinned default models for 3p (Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry)

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_{OPUS,SONNET,HAIKU}_MODEL_NAME
env_vars.purpose: Customize the `/model` picker label

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_{OPUS,SONNET,HAIKU}_MODEL_DESCRIPTION
env_vars.purpose: Customize the `/model` picker label

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_STREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS
env_vars.purpose: Configure the streaming idle watchdog threshold (default 90s)

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_SERVER_NAME
env_vars.purpose: MCP `headersHelper` scripts, allowing one helper to serve multiple servers

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_SERVER_URL
env_vars.purpose: MCP `headersHelper` scripts, allowing one helper to serve multiple servers

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER
env_vars.purpose: Opt into flicker-free alt-screen rendering with virtualized scrollback.

env_vars.name: MCP_CONNECTION_NONBLOCKING
env_vars.purpose: Skip the MCP connection wait entirely in `-p` mode.

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_KEEP_MARKETPLACE_ON_FAILURE
env_vars.purpose: Keeps the existing marketplace cache when `git pull` fails, useful in offline environments.

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_USE_MANTLE
env_vars.purpose: Enables support for Amazon Bedrock powered by Mantle.

models.note: Sonnet 4.5 Pro/Max/Team Premium users auto-migrated to 4.6

breaking_changes.title: `--plugin-dir` flag now accepts only one path
breaking_changes.description: The `--plugin-dir` flag has been updated to only accept a single path. To specify multiple plugin directories, use the `--plugin-dir` flag repeatedly.
affected: Users who specify multiple plugin directories using comma-separated values with the `--plugin-dir` flag.
breaking_changes.migration: Update your command-line arguments to use repeated `--plugin-dir` flags for each directory.

breaking_changes.title: Agent tool no longer accepts a `resume` parameter
breaking_changes.description: The Agent tool no longer accepts a `resume` parameter.
breaking_changes.migration: Use `SendMessage({to: agentId})` to continue a previously spawned agent.

breaking_changes.title: Issue/PR link format change
breaking_changes.description: Issue/PR references now only become clickable links when written as `owner/repo#123`. Bare `#123` is no longer auto-linked.
breaking_changes.migration: Update any scripts or workflows that rely on bare `#123` being auto-linked to use the `owner/repo#123` format.

breaking_changes.title: Issue/PR link format change
breaking_changes.description: Issue/PR references are now only clickable links when written as `owner/repo#123`. Bare `#123` is no longer auto-linked.
affected: Users who rely on auto-linking of bare issue/PR numbers
breaking_changes.migration: Update issue/PR references to the `owner/repo#123` format to ensure they are clickable links.

breaking_changes.title: Thinking summaries disabled by default in interactive sessions
breaking_changes.description: Thinking summaries are no longer generated by default in interactive sessions.
breaking_changes.migration: Set `showThinkingSummaries: true` in settings to restore the previous behavior.

breaking_changes.title: `cleanupPeriodDays: 0` in settings.json is now rejected
breaking_changes.description: Setting `cleanupPeriodDays` to `0` in `settings.json` will now result in a validation error. Previously, this silently disabled transcript persistence.
breaking_changes.migration: Remove `cleanupPeriodDays: 0` from your `settings.json` file or set it to a non-zero value to enable transcript persistence.

breaking_changes.title: Removal of /vim command
breaking_changes.description: The `/vim` command has been removed. Toggling vim mode is now done via `/config` → Editor mode.
affected: Users who rely on the `/vim` command to toggle vim mode.
breaking_changes.migration: Use `/config` → Editor mode to toggle vim mode.

breaking_changes.title: /tag command removed
breaking_changes.migration: Use alternative methods for tagging or note-taking.

breaking_changes.title: /vim command removed
breaking_changes.migration: Toggle vim mode via `/config` → Editor mode.

notable_keys.autoMemoryDirectory: string — custom directory for auto-memory storage (new in 2.1.74)
notable_keys.modelOverrides: object — map model picker entries to custom provider model IDs (new in 2.1.73)
notable_keys.includeGitInstructions: boolean — include built-in git commit/PR workflow instructions
